overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic city. The player moves from a covered neon-lit walkway into bright sunlight, passing modern glass buildings including the Kiroshi and Dynalar corporate structures, with light traffic and sparse pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon ceiling lights

events.description: exiting covered walkway into bright open sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing vending machines and digital billboards on the left

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera through the covered walkway

illuminated food vending machine with bright display

metal safety railing separating walkway from street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian walkway with a high ceiling featuring cyan neon light strips. The player walks forward past illuminated vending machines and digital billboards on the left side, with a metal railing separating the walkway from the street on the right. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction as the player moves toward the bright exit at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with corporate signage

events.description: turning head to observe the Kiroshi building signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk, glancing at the Kiroshi corporate building and elevated walkways

notable_agents.action: man in gray sweater walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: modern corporate building with large circular logo and Japanese text signage
elevated highway or monorail structure crossing above the street
glowing cyan holographic barrier marking the entrance to the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into bright morning sunlight, the scene opens onto a wide urban street. The Kiroshi corporate building dominates the right side with its distinctive circular logo and Japanese text, while elevated transport structures span overhead. The player walks along the concrete sidewalk past sparse pedestrians and palm trees, with modern glass towers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with corporate plaza and crosswalk

events.description: vintage gold coupe drives past on the multi-lane street
tilting camera upward to view the Dynalar building architecture

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching the Dynalar building entrance, pausing to look up at the architecture

notable_agents.action: vintage gold coupe driving along the street
red sports car passing by the crosswalk

entered.detail: futuristic corporate building with curved roof and illuminated signage
large green holographic cube display showing human figure advertisement
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
black and yellow striped posts lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a wide city intersection marked with striped crosswalks, approaching the Dynalar corporate building. A vintage gold coupe and red sports car drive past on the multi-lane road. The Dynalar building features a prominent green holographic display and curved architectural elements. The player pauses to look up at the building's illuminated roof structure before continuing toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building entrance plaza with stairs

events.description: black sedan pulls away from curb and drives slowly ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the Dynalar building sidewalk, following a black sedan and passing pedestrians near the entrance stairs

notable_agents.action: black sedan pulling away from the curb and driving along the street

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the Dynalar building entrance
high-rise apartment building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the plaza in front of the Dynalar building, the player passes the entrance stairs where several pedestrians are gathered. A black sedan pulls away from the curb and drives ahead along the street. The Dynalar building recedes into the background as the player continues down the sidewalk, with distant skyscrapers visible through the palm-lined street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit interior corridor into the bright, expansive sunlight of a futuristic corporate district. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway beneath cyan light strips, moving past glowing vending machines and digital billboards toward a brilliant exit. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens into a wide urban street dominated by the Kiroshi corporate building and elevated transport structures under a clear morning sky. The scene then shifts across a striped city intersection, passing a vintage gold coupe and a red sports car before approaching the curved architecture and green holographic displays of the Dynalar building. Finally, the camera glides along the Dynalar plaza past gathered pedestrians and a departing black sedan, moving further down the palm-lined sidewalk toward a horizon of distant skyscrapers.
